title: SQL Mission 9: Top 3 Salaries Per Department

initialState.content:
-- Mission 9 Guidelines
-- Use ROW_NUMBER partitioned by department
-- Rank by salary descending inside each department
-- Keep only top 3 ranks

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    department,
    name,
    salary,
    -- TODO ranking expression
  FROM employees
)
SELECT
  -- TODO
FROM ranked
WHERE
  -- TODO
ORDER BY department, salary DESC;

rules: must_include:row_number() over (partition by department order by salary desc) as rn
